final:
module RefModule( 
    input do_sub,
    input [8-1:1-1] a,
    input [7:0] b,
    output reg [7:0] out,
    output reg result_is_zero
);always @(*) begin
        case (do_sub)
          0: out = a+b;
          1: out = a-b;
        endcase

        result_is_zero = (out == 0);
    end

endmodule
